project_type: Next.js 16 App Router with React 19, freemium calculator suite
test_framework: Playwright e2e tests in tests/ directory
verification_instructions: Run next build to confirm no type or build errors. Playwright tests require running dev server.
environment_constraints: No Docker daemon available. Use next build for validation. Playwright requires dev server running on port 3000.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns: 'use client' for interactive components, components in components/ directory organized by feature area, pages in app/ using App Router conventions, Tailwind CSS for styling, Lucide React for icons, Radix UI for primitives.
key_patterns: ProStatusContext manages pro/free state via email+PayPal verification. useProStatus() hook returns { isPro, isLoading }. Premium components in components/premium/. Lead capture forms in components/lead-capture/. Landing pages follow pattern in app/for/homebuyers/page.tsx with hero, problem statement, tools grid, email capture. Comparison pages at app/compare/ with index listing + individual sub-pages. PremiumBanner is a simple CTA section. StickyUpgradeNudge is a dismissible bottom bar. UI components (Button, Card, etc.) in components/ui/. Global layout wraps with Providers (ProStatusProvider) + LeadCaptureProvider.
directory_structure: app/ - App Router pages (pricing, blog, dashboard, compare, calculators, for/ persona pages); components/ - organized by feature (premium/, lead-capture/, features/, ads/, ui/, seo/, layouts/); lib/ - utilities, config, hooks, contexts; tests/ - Playwright e2e tests; public/ - static assets
